question.label: Energy read
question.name: How's your energy been lately — separately from how work is going?
question.description: Separates energy from output; avoids leading with 'is something wrong'.

assessment.note: The question was skipped, providing no signal on wellbeing.

new_queue.label: Recent challenges
new_queue.name: What's been your biggest challenge in the last few weeks?

new_queue.label: Impact of lateness
new_queue.name: How does being late affect your workload or day-to-day priorities?

new_queue.label: Motivation drivers
new_queue.name: What currently motivates you the most in your role?

new_queue.label: Priority alignment
new_queue.name: Which priorities feel most unclear or conflicting for you right now?

new_queue.label: Support needs
new_queue.name: What support would help you address any challenges with being on time?

new_queue.label: Team dynamics
new_queue.name: How do you perceive your lateness affecting team interactions?

new_queue.label: Energy fluctuations
new_queue.name: What patterns have you noticed in your energy levels throughout the day?

new_queue.label: Long-term goals
new_queue.name: Where do you see your role evolving in the next year?
